title: Jewel AI Studio — Prompt Engineering Master Reference
description: Comprehensive master reference document for all Jewel AI Studio prompt engineering. Covers: prompt architecture, workflow descriptions, jewelry type child prompts, gemstone science, metal physics, environment library, and quality standards.

prompt_architecture.structure_overview: Every generation in Jewel AI Studio uses a layered modular JSON architecture. The layers are assembled in order and compiled into a single final_compiled_prompt string sent to the Gemini/Imagen API.

layers.1_system_role: Defines the AI's expert identity and professional mandate. Sets quality expectations. Written in second-person ('Act as...'). Always the first block in the compiled prompt.
layers.2_camera_settings: Defines the camera, lens, aperture, ISO, and photographic quality parameters. Grounds the generation in real photographic physics.
layers.3_environment: Defines the physical world around the jewelry — the surface, the background, the spatial context. Must be physically plausible and luxury-grade.
layers.4_subject: Defines the specific jewelry piece's composition, positioning, and arrangement. One entry per jewelry type selected. If multiple types selected, all are compiled into a unified multi-piece arrangement.
layers.5_user_instruction: Optional. Appended only if the user explicitly provides a custom instruction. Contains no default fallback — if empty, this block is completely omitted from the compiled prompt.
layers.6_lighting_and_physics: Defines the light sources, their direction, intensity, and how they interact with the jewelry's metal and gemstones. Always physically accurate.
layers.7_preservation_lock: Critical safety block. Lists all non-negotiable preservation mandates for the jewelry's physical integrity.
layers.8_negative_prompt: Passed as a separate Gemini negativePrompt parameter. Lists all forbidden outputs to suppress common AI artifacts.

prompt_architecture.compilation_formula: final_compiled_prompt = system_role + camera_settings + subject + [user_instruction if present] + environment + lighting_and_physics + preservation_lock

gemstone_science_library.description: Reference data for accurate gemstone optical property descriptions in prompts. Use these physical properties to ensure generated gemstones look scientifically correct.

diamond.brilliance: Extreme — highest brilliance of all natural gemstones
diamond.color_grades: D (colorless) to Z (light yellow/brown). Fancy colors: pink, blue, yellow, green, red, black
diamond.visual_characteristics: Bright white-silver brilliance, spectral rainbow fire in pavilion facets, sharp on/off scintillation pattern, table reflects clean bright white spot from light source
diamond.prompt_key_phrases: extreme brilliance, spectral fire, rainbow dispersion, clean white light return, faceted brilliance pattern, culet visible as dark circle at stone center

ruby.mineral: Corundum (Aluminum Oxide) — chromium causes red color
ruby.color_grades: Pigeon blood red (finest), purplish red, orangey red
ruby.visual_characteristics: Deep saturated red body, warm red fire in facets, possible asterism in cabochon cuts (6-rayed star), high brilliance, pure chromium red without orange
ruby.prompt_key_phrases: chromium red, pigeon blood saturation, deep red fire, warm red brilliance, no orange overtone, red depth

sapphire.mineral: Corundum (Aluminum Oxide) — iron and titanium cause blue color
sapphire.color_grades: Royal blue, cornflower blue, padparadscha (pink-orange), yellow, purple, green, white
sapphire.visual_characteristics: Deep saturated blue with violet undertone in deep shadow areas, cool blue-white specular highlights, velvety blue depth
sapphire.prompt_key_phrases: royal blue saturation, cool blue fire, blue-violet depth, velvety blue luminosity, cornflower clarity

emerald.mineral: Beryl (Beryllium Aluminum Silicate) — chromium/vanadium causes green color
emerald.color_grades: Colombian green (finest), Brazilian green, Zambian green
emerald.visual_characteristics: Rich deep green body, jardins (natural inclusions giving internal depth), characteristic oily luster, warm velvety green glow, moderate facet brilliance
emerald.prompt_key_phrases: colombian green depth, jardins internal texture, velvety green luster, oily emerald gloss, warm green glow, rich forest green

moissanite.dispersion_fire: 0.104 (highest of common gemstones — 2.4x more fire than diamond)
moissanite.brilliance: Extreme — slightly more brilliant than diamond
moissanite.color_grades: Colorless (DEF equivalent), near-colorless, slightly warm (GHI equivalent)
moissanite.visual_characteristics: Near-colorless or very slight warmth, dramatically more fire than diamond (more intense rainbow flashes), doubly refractive creating a slight doubling of facets visible at high magnification
moissanite.prompt_key_phrases: exceptional fire dispersion, rainbow flashes more intense than diamond, brilliant colorless, slight warm tint in deep body, maximum light return

pearl.brilliance: Moderate — unique 'orient' and 'luster' quality rather than brilliance
pearl.types: Akoya (round, white/cream), South Sea (large, white/gold), Tahitian (black/dark multicolor), Freshwater (various shapes, white/pink/lavender)
pearl.visual_characteristics: Silky, organic luster (depth of light reflecting from beneath surface layers), orient (rainbow iridescence on surface), perfectly round or baroque shapes, warm creamy body color for Akoya
pearl.prompt_key_phrases: silky orient luster, deep pearlescent glow, surface iridescence, creamy white body, organic roundness, layered nacre depth, soft luminosity

opal.dispersion_fire: N/A — optical property is play-of-color, not fire
opal.special_phenomenon: Play-of-color — spectral color patches shift and move across the surface
opal.types: White opal, black opal (most valuable), crystal opal, fire opal (orange body)
opal.visual_characteristics: Shifting patches of spectral color (red, orange, green, blue, violet) across a body color (white, dark, or transparent), color patches move as viewing angle changes, no faceting — cabochon dome shape
opal.prompt_key_phrases: play-of-color phenomenon, shifting spectral patches, organic color patterns, deep black body play-of-color, dome-shaped cabochon, vivid spectral flashes across surface

tanzanite.mineral: Zoisite (calcium aluminum silicate) — vanadium causes color
tanzanite.special_phenomenon: Trichroism — shows blue, violet, and burgundy depending on viewing axis
tanzanite.visual_characteristics: Deep blue-violet primary hue, shifting to burgundy/reddish-purple at certain angles, rich and velvety depth, high brilliance
tanzanite.prompt_key_phrases: blue-violet trichroic depth, shifting burgundy axis, velvety tanzanite blue, rich violet luminosity, deep color with directional shift

metal_physics_library.description: Reference data for accurate metal surface rendering descriptions. Use these physical properties to ensure generated metals look correctly differentiated and photorealistic.

surface_finishes.polished: Mirror-bright warm gold surface, yellow-gold specular highlights (not white), deep honey gold in mid-tones, rich dark gold in shadow recesses
surface_finishes.brushed_satin: Fine directional linear grain perpendicular to scratch direction, matte warm gold with narrow bright directional highlight stripe
surface_finishes.hammered: Irregular faceted surface, each hammer mark creates a micro-mirror reflecting environment in different directions simultaneously
surface_finishes.matte: Diffuse warm gold with almost no specular, slightly rougher surface texture, uniform warm gold

18k_yellow_gold.prompt_key_phrases: warm honey gold, rich yellow-gold specular, warm amber metal reflections, 18-karat warmth, deep gold shadow depth

surface_finishes.polished: Cool steel-blue mirror surface, blue-white specular highlights, neutral cool silver mid-tones, cool dark gray shadows
surface_finishes.brushed: Fine directional grain, matte cool silver with a precise directional bright stripe, ultra-precise and architectural feel
surface_finishes.granulated: Textured granular surface typical of antique platinum, each grain a tiny mirror creating complex scattered reflections

platinum.prompt_key_phrases: cool platinum luster, architectural silver precision, blue-white specular, cool neutral metal, pristine platinum finish

18k_white_gold.composition: 75% pure gold, 25% white alloy (palladium or nickel), rhodium plated
18k_white_gold.color_hex_approximate: #D8D8D8 to #C0C0C0 (slightly warmer than platinum due to gold alloy)
18k_white_gold.notes: Very similar to platinum visually but slightly warmer and can develop a warm undertone as rhodium plating wears — appears brighter/more mirror-like than platinum due to rhodium
18k_white_gold.prompt_key_phrases: rhodium-plated brilliance, bright silver mirror, slight warmth beneath cool surface, contemporary white metal, maximum brightness

14k_rose_gold.composition: 58.5% pure gold, 41.5% alloy (copper-heavy to create pink color)

surface_finishes.polished: Warm blush-copper-pink mirror surface, warm pink-white specular highlights, rich rose-copper mid-tones, deeper copper in shadow recesses
surface_finishes.brushed: Fine directional grain with warm rose-copper matte and a precise bright blush stripe

14k_rose_gold.prompt_key_phrases: blush rose copper warmth, romantic pink metal, warm rose specular, copper-rose mid-tones, contemporary rose warmth

sterling_silver.notes: Slightly warmer and slightly yellower than platinum or rhodium-plated white gold. Can show subtle warmth or slight yellow hue. Can tarnish to dark gray-brown (oxidized silver has its own desirable aesthetic in some designs).
sterling_silver.prompt_key_phrases: classic sterling brightness, slightly warm silver, neutral metal luster, artisanal silver quality

environment_library.description: Curated library of professional photography environments for jewelry. Each environment is described with surface, background, lighting, and mood characteristics.

studio_cream_velvet.name: Premium Cream Velvet Studio
studio_cream_velvet.surface: Cream-white velvet with ultra-fine micro-texture, soft and tactile
studio_cream_velvet.background: Seamless cream-white infinity sweep, gradient from warm white at center to very slightly shadowed at edges
studio_cream_velvet.lighting_mood: 5500K warm-neutral studio strobe, overhead-front softbox, fill reflector
studio_cream_velvet.best_for: All jewelry types, all metals, all gemstones — universal commercial standard
studio_cream_velvet.color_palette: Cream, warm white, soft ivory shadows

black_acrylic.name: High-Gloss Black Acrylic
black_acrylic.surface: Mirror-polished black acrylic with perfect reflection
black_acrylic.background: Deep obsidian black infinity, blue-black gradient preventing flatness
black_acrylic.lighting_mood: Controlled softbox, mirror reflection of jewelry visible on surface
black_acrylic.best_for: Maximum drama and contrast, excellent for diamonds and white metals
black_acrylic.color_palette: Jet black, blue-black, bright specular white

white_carrara_marble.name: Carrara Marble
white_carrara_marble.surface: White marble with organic gray veining, matte-satin finish
white_carrara_marble.background: Marble wall sweep (same marble continuing upward), or neutral white background
white_carrara_marble.best_for: Yellow gold, colored gemstones, romantic pieces
white_carrara_marble.color_palette: Pure white, gray silver veining, warm stone tones

dark_navy_velvet.name: Midnight Navy Velvet
dark_navy_velvet.surface: Rich midnight navy blue velvet, deep and tactile
dark_navy_velvet.lighting_mood: Dramatic single-source side lighting, deep shadow areas
dark_navy_velvet.best_for: Diamonds, gold jewelry, maximum luxury drama
dark_navy_velvet.color_palette: Deep navy, gold accent light, rich shadow depth

golden_hour_organic.name: Golden Hour Natural Light
golden_hour_organic.surface: Light travertine, pale stone, or bleached wood
golden_hour_organic.lighting_mood: Warm directional golden hour sunlight from one side, amber rim light on jewelry
golden_hour_organic.best_for: Yellow gold, rose gold, rubies, yellow sapphires, organic-design pieces
golden_hour_organic.color_palette: Warm amber, golden orange, soft cream

glass_surface.name: Clear Glass / Transparent Surface
glass_surface.surface: Clear optical glass panel — jewelry rests on top, glass allows subtle transparent reflection
glass_surface.background: Pure white or gradient gray behind the glass
glass_surface.lighting_mood: Clean, even studio light from above, glass adds dimension without strong reflection
glass_surface.best_for: Modern, architectural jewelry, diamonds, geometric pieces
glass_surface.color_palette: Pure white, cool gray, transparent depth

luxury_interior.name: Luxury Interior Lifestyle
luxury_interior.surface: White marble countertop, warm oak surface, or glass shelf
luxury_interior.background: Upscale interior — white walls, out-of-focus luxury furnishings, natural window light
luxury_interior.lighting_mood: Large soft window daylight (5600K), secondary warm interior ambient fill
luxury_interior.best_for: Lifestyle marketing, aspirational brand positioning, all jewelry types
luxury_interior.color_palette: Warm white, natural daylight, interior warmth

quality_standards.commercial_minimum: Every generated image must meet commercial catalog standard — suitable for product listing on luxury e-commerce platforms without any further retouching.
quality_standards.luxury_campaign_target: The aspirational target is luxury brand campaign quality — the level of Cartier, Tiffany, Van Cleef & Arpels, or Harry Winston advertising photography.
rejection_criteria: Any visible AI artifact (melted text, impossible geometry, stippled patterns on metal)
Any alteration to the jewelry design that was not requested
Floating jewelry without a physical contact point
Backgrounds that look flat, digital, or obviously AI-generated
Lighting that is physically impossible for the described scene
Gemstone colors that are incorrect for the specified mineral
Over-processed, HDR-like, or obviously retouched appearance
Low resolution, grain, or compression artifacts

01.description: Studio product catalog photography — all jewelry types

02.description: Editorial and campaign jewelry on professional model
